message:
fix(error): eliminate unreachable!() in detect_priority_intent (beads_rust-4c30, beads_rust-zozm)

Replace two unreachable!() arms in detect_priority_intent's digit
and P-prefix match blocks with safe None returns. Add exhaustive
tests for all P0-P4 inputs and malformed values (p5, px, p10, etc).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
